Chainway sleep fix: sleepGun disconnects BLE on main thread immediately, pin setReaderAwaitSleepTime(1) before drop, no free() so watchdog stays suppressed. Firmware powers down ~1min after link release.
Idle timer fix shipped in GAS v498 — install both.

Chainway trigger-idle sleep: native timer tracks last trigger pull (not RFID scans). After configured idle minutes with no trigger, releases BLE so firmware powers gun down. setGunIdleSleepMinutes bridge from web dropdown.
Watchdog suppressed while asleep — pull trigger then Reconnect gun to wake.

Chainway gun now actually sleeps: the app now sets the reader's built-in auto-sleep timer to 1 minute (setReaderAwaitSleepTime) on connect and when the idle timer sleeps the gun, so it powers down shortly after instead of staying lit forever.
Wake the gun after sleep by pulling the trigger, then tap Reconnect gun.
Gun-sleep idle dropdown now works for the Chainway too (shared settings menu).
Gun auto-sleep timer: gun powers down after chosen idle minutes (1/2/3/5/10) to save battery
wake with trigger + Reconnect
Settings: new 'Sleep the gun after (idle)' dropdown next to the host-eject timer

Trigger brings the station to the front: when the gun is connected, pulling the trigger now wakes the screen AND foregrounds the Showrunner Station app if something else is showing (home screen / another app / screen off). Uses SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW (Display over other apps, prompted once at setup) to allow the background Activity launch
singleTask reorder means no WebView rebuild. First pull brings it up, next pull scans (same pattern as screen wake).

Restore station loading splash on every cold start: the rotating-circle 'SHOWRUNNER STATION / STARTING' screen now covers the whole boot until the shell reports ready, instead of a black screen then a flash of the personal web UI. Removed the persistent splash-dismissed flag that permanently suppressed it after the first launch (config-change recreation still restores hidden state via savedInstanceState).

Fix true root cause: RFID gun is an HID keyboard so connect/disconnect changed the keyboard config and recreated the Activity, rebooting the UI. Handle keyboard|navigation config changes so the WebView survives gun flap
Add gun config-change breadcrumb toast
